title: Facial Wipes with Cucumber Extract and Pro Vitamin B5, 25 Wipes, Cool and Refreshing, All Skin Types, Pack of 2 with crwp card.
features: PACK CONTENTS: Set of 2 packs of facial wipes, each containing 25 wipes for convenient daily cleansing and makeup removal
NATURAL INGREDIENTS: Enriched with cucumber extract and Pro-Vitamin B5 for a cooling and refreshing cleansing experience
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for all skin types, these lightly fragranced wipes effectively cleanse and tone the skin
MAKEUP REMOVAL: Specially formulated to effectively remove makeup and mascara whilst maintaining skin's natural balance
CONVENIENT PACKAGING: Resealable pack design helps maintain wipe freshness and moisture for long-lasting effectiveness
description: Product description Experience the ultimate in facial freshness with these cooling cucumber extract facial wipes. Each pack contains 25 wipes enriched with Pro Vitamin B5 to cleanse, tone, and refresh your skin. The lightly fragranced wipes effectively remove makeup and mascara whilst providing a cool, refreshing sensation. Formulated to be gentle yet effective, these wipes are suitable for all skin types. The convenient pack design makes them perfect for travel, gym bags, or your daily skincare routine. The combination of cucumber extract and Pro Vitamin B5 helps maintain skin's natural balance whilst cleansing. These versatile wipes offer a quick and effective solution for maintaining clean, fresh-feeling skin throughout the day. The resealable packaging helps keep the wipes moist and ready for use. Perfect for those seeking a convenient and refreshing cleansing solution that doesn't compromise on effectiveness. Safety Warning external use only
